| `timelineChronologyShowWeekNumbers` | [`Boolean`](../scalars/boolean-scalar.md) | `none` | No | Whether to show week numbers in timeline chronology bar. |
| `timelineZoomScale` | [`Float`](../scalars/float-scalar.md) | `none` | No | The zoom scale for the timeline view. |
| `triageViewOrdering` | [`String`](../scalars/string-scalar.md) | `none` | No | The triage view ordering. |
| `viewOrdering` | [`String`](../scalars/string-scalar.md) | `none` | No | The issue ordering. |
| `viewOrderingDirection` | [`String`](../scalars/string-scalar.md) | `none` | No | The direction of the issue ordering. |
| `workspaceMembersViewOrdering` | [`String`](../scalars/string-scalar.md) | `none` | No | The workspace members view ordering. |
